title: ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Backpack Kit Collapsible Bucket Prospecting Tools 13pc
description:
The ASR Outdoor 13pc Deluxe Gold Panning Kit comes with everything you’ll need to pan for gold – a sifting classifier, gold pans, a sand scoop, a mini sluice box, glass vials, snifter bottles, and a magnetic pickup tool. All of the items fit neatly inside of a 30-liter capacity canvas backpack (color may vary) featuring reinforced stitching and sturdy zip and buckle closures.] Included with the kit is a BPA Free silicone collapsible bucket designed to fit on a standard 5-gallon bucket. Incredibly versatile in nature, this bucket will work seamlessly with classifier sieves for gold panning, prospecting, and mining. It can also be used as a beverage cooler, small laundry basket, pet bowl, firewood carrier, gardening, or fishing bucket

ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Backpack Kit Collapsible Bucket Prospecting Tools 13pc

The ASR Outdoor 13pc Deluxe Gold Panning Kit comes with everything you’ll need to pan for gold – a sifting classifier, gold pans, a sand scoop, a mini sluice box, glass vials, snifter bottles, and a magnetic pickup tool. All of the items fit neatly inside of a 30-liter capacity canvas backpack (color may vary) featuring reinforced stitching and sturdy zip and buckle closures.]

Included with the kit is a BPA Free silicone collapsible bucket designed to fit on a standard 5-gallon bucket. Incredibly versatile in nature, this bucket will work seamlessly with classifier sieves for gold panning, prospecting, and mining. It can also be used as a beverage cooler, small laundry basket, pet bowl, firewood carrier, gardening, or fishing bucket.

Key Features

  • 13PC GOLD PROSPECTING KIT – The ASR Outdoor 13pc Deluxe Gold Panning Kit comes with everything you’ll need to pan for gold – a sifting classifier, gold pans, a sand scoop, a mini sluice box, glass vials, snifter bottles and a magnetic pick up tool. All of the items fit neatly inside of a 30 liter capacity canvas backpack (color may vary) featuring reinforced stitching and sturdy zip and buckle closures.
  • COLLAPSIBLE BUCKET – Included with the kit is a BPA Free silicone collapsible bucket designed to fit on a standard 5 gallon bucket. Incredibly versatile in nature, this bucket will work seamlessly with classifier sieves for gold panning, prospecting and mining. It can also be used as a beverage cooler, small laundry basket, pet bowl, firewood carrier, gardening or fishing bucket.
  • DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS – Each backpack kit comes with 3 different dual riffle gold pans (8”, 12” and 14” diameter) that are designed to fit with the collapsible bucket. They come in a deep blue color that will assist with identifying gold nuggets and flakes while sifting through dirt, sand and silt. We’ve also included a 1/2” classifier sieve that also fits with the collapsible bucket, great for sifting through coarser material.
  • MINI ALUMINUM SLUICE BOX – Inside the backpack you’ll find a compact and portable mini sluice box that is just 12” in length, featuring high channel walls and V-shape ribbed rubber matting ideal for gold mining. Ready to use out of the kit, the mini sluice box requires no assembly so you can get to work right away.
  • GOLD PANNING ACCESSORIES – Lastly, we’ve included a set of essential gold panning accessories that will help with separating, scooping and storing gold – a 12” sand scoop, (2) 3oz snifter bottles, 2 glass collection vials and 5lb magnetic pick up tool that will distinguish gold flakes from black sand.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROGPKIT13
  • UPC: 810058486219
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 13pc

Each backpack kit comes with 3 different dual riffle gold pans (8”, 12”, and 14” diameter) that are designed to fit with the collapsible bucket. They come in a deep blue color that will assist with identifying gold nuggets and flakes while sifting through dirt, sand, and silt. We’ve also included a 1/2” classifier sieve that also fits with the collapsible bucket, great for sifting through coarser material.

Inside the backpack you’ll find a compact and portable mini sluice box that is just 12” in length, featuring high channel walls and V-shape ribbed rubber matting ideal for gold mining. Ready to use out of the kit, the mini sluice box requires no assembly so you can get to work right away.

Lastly, we’ve included a set of essential gold panning accessories that will help with separating, scooping, and storing gold – a 12” sand scoop, (2) 3oz snifter bottles, 2 glass collection vials, and a 5lb magnetic pickup tool that will distinguish gold flakes from black sand.

This kit was designed for beginner, intermediate, and expert gold prospectors, so you rest assured you can enjoy gold panning whether you’re just starting out or a seasoned gold panner. Gold panning is also a great activity for kids that will encourage outdoor activity and exercise. Make sure to grab one of these kits for yourself or a friend who loves gold panning – it just might pay off!
